{{CargoOrgan
|name=LEGO Arm
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10946
|idx=140
|description=Standard C-shaped hollow palm with no texture or mechanical parts. Uses ball joints for multi-directional rotation. Opening curvature fits common rod-shaped parts. Basic gripping function only.
|skill=
|hp=2630
|def=281
|atk=240
|rush=286
|gene1=Earth DMG +120
|gene2=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene3=For Round 1, DMG +10%
|gene4=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene5=Break RES +4%
|gene6=RUSH DMG +10%
|gene7=DMG +5% (Awakened)
|}}
